title: taraxacum runcinatum
intro: Taraxacum runcinatum, also known as the rough hawk's beard or rough dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum runcinatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
